summary: Completed comprehensive testing of theFRIEND app's major UI update with new requirements. All features working perfectly including auto-login with demo user, custom hand-with-heart logo, soft pink/blue color scheme, human avatar customization with locked items system, and multi-language support.
passed_tests: App loads directly to home dashboard without registration (demo user auto-created)
Custom logo (hand with heart - pink/blue) displays correctly in header
Soft pink and blue color scheme implemented throughout app
Home dashboard displays Daily Check-in card, supportive message, and meme
Daily check-in flow works perfectly - mood selection, questions, submission with confetti
Good Deeds tab navigation and list display with pink/blue theme
Profile/Me tab shows human avatar character correctly
Avatar customization shows exactly 4 unlocked + 4 locked options for each category (hair, face, shirt, pants)
Locked items display lock icons and hint text 'Earn points to unlock more!'
Language selector works for all three languages (English, Russian, Kazakh)
All bottom navigation tabs (Home, Good Deeds, Feelings, Me) work correctly
Multi-language support with proper text translation
Responsive design and smooth animations throughout
Points system and streak tracking working
Avatar preview updates correctly in profile

success_percentage.ui_design: 100% (pink/blue theme, custom logo, human avatar all implemented)
